opportunities.title: [Hiring] Wordmark + one product label for a luxury tea brand — engraving/vintage-botanical style — $300–600
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Wordmark + one product label for a luxury tea brand — engraving/vintage-botanical style — $300–600

Hey all! I'm launching an online luxury loose-leaf tea house where every blend is a named character pulled from Greek/non-greek myth and old-world geography. The north star: a lost antique atlas where every region is a tea. I'm looking for an illustrator/designer to create the wordmark + the label for my first blend — one hero piece to launch with. opportunities.title: National Account Manager Foodservice
opportunities.description:
Your Job

We are currently seeking two National Account Manager to join our CPG Sales organization, supporting the away-from-home GP Foodservice Solutions. This role is highly strategic, working closely with a portfolio of customers within the top 300 US restaurant chains and convenience stores. In this role, the National Account Manager will be responsible for business development, category expansion, price realization, and account management. This position is open to remote working opportunities. This position reports into a Director of National Accounts.

opportunities.title: Admin & Operation English Speaker
opportunities.description:
Job Description

  • Manage student registrations, enrollments, attendance, customer records, and CRM data with accuracy.
  • Coordinate trial classes, schedules, instructor assignments, room bookings, programme registrations, and rescheduling requests.
  • Support programme administration, including workshops, performances, competitions, examinations, and other academy events.
  • Serve as the primary point of contact for students, parents, and prospective customers, providing timely and professional support across multiple communication channels.

opportunities.title: Assistant to the Director & Project Coordinator (all genders)
opportunities.description:
IDAGIO is the leading streaming service for classical music, based in Berlin and part of IDAGIO Group. The Group spans streaming, recordings, and live music partnerships, globally. Our director initiates projects across all of it: recording partnerships with orchestras, licensing talks with international labels, concert-hall collaborations in Taiwan and Japan, and new ventures.

These initiatives move fast and span many time zones. We are looking for the person at the director's side who keeps them all on track.

Tasks

You are the assistant to the sole director of IDAGI
